items.title: Microsoft lays off nearly 5,000 employees across Xbox, commercial sales
items.summary: Microsoft cut around 4,800 roles, or 2.1% of its global workforce, on Monday — the latest in a series of layoffs that’s stoking fears of AI replacing jobs. The layoffs will hit Xbox and commercial sales the hardest.

items.title: UK regulator warns of "arms race" to keep up with AI use in financial services
items.summary: FCA official makes case for greater powers for watchdog as millions use technology for personal finance decisions.

items.title: Microsoft is laying off 4,800 employees
items.summary: A year after cutting around 9,100 employees, Microsoft is making further layoffs today as it begins its new financial year. items.title: Station F ramps up as a launchpad for Europe’s hottest AI startups
items.summary: Station F, a Paris-based startup hub founded by French billionaire Xavier Niel, is gearing up for a new edition of its F/ai accelerator program in a bid to strengthen its positioning as a stepping stone for promising AI startups.

items.title: 🤗 Kernels: Major Updates

items.summary: Most Americans don't trust AI. It's proven that it doesn't know what safe toppings for pizza are. People don't even want to listen to AI music. items.summary: These may be the last days of Amazon’s Mechanical Turk.

items.summary: "Group project, but make it 1776." That's how a new commercial for Google Workspace opens. And things only get cringier from there. items.title: New Google commercial imagines a Declaration of Independence written with help from AI
items.summary: Two hundred and fifty years after the signing of the Declaration of Independence, a new commercial asks: What if the Founding Fathers had access to Google Workspace?

items.title: Midjourney wants Hollywood studios to reveal the details of their AI usage
items.summary: As part of an ongoing legal dispute with three Hollywood studios, Midjourney is seeking to compel those studios to reveal how they use AI themselves.

items.title: Alibaba reportedly bans employees from using Claude Code
items.summary: Alibaba has reportedly classified Claude Code as high-risk software.

items.title: What is Mistral AI? Everything to know about the OpenAI competitor
items.summary: Mistral AI, which offers some open source AI models, has raised significant funding since its creation in 2023, with the ambition to “put frontier AI in the hands of everyone.”

items.title: The fanfiction community is at war with AI — and itself
